Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Amending Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC.'s Motion For Order Amending Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Off calendar. Parties to contact Department 505, which issued the underlying judgment, to re-set their motion.
